raw.message: Minjae x Jihoon from Brain Puzzle: Tricky Test

hook.summary: A character's neck stretches unnaturally to kiss another character in a movie theater.

scene_flow: Character's neck stretches to kiss another character in a movie theater.
Transition to the characters sleeping on each other's shoulders.
Reaction shot of a girl in the background looking excited.
Final close-up of the two male characters sleeping together.
on_screen_text: Why is my brainpuzzle game So yaoiful
